scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:form" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.security:scan-secrets: echo 'Instala veilguard manualmente: npm install -g veilguard'
scripts.security:scan-code: echo 'Instala kuzushi manualmente: npm install -g kuzushi'
scripts.security:check: echo '=== Verificación de seguridad ===' && echo '1. Shield: Detección de ataques en apps/api/src/app/lib/security/shield.ts' && echo '2. Bot Detection: apps/api/src/app/lib/security/botDetector.ts' && echo '3. Rate Limiter: MongoDB-based en apps/api/src/app/lib/security/rateLimiter.ts' && echo '4. Prompt Injection: HTTP-level en apps/api/src/app/lib/security/promptInjection.ts' && echo '5. Guardrails: AI agents protegidos en apps/api/src/app/lib/agents/guard.ts' && echo '6. Security Headers: Configurados en apps/api/next.config.ts'
